one_line: Information-theoretic argument + runnable entropy witness over 42 real scenarios: H(y)=0.971 bits, R1 alone removes 86.8%, 3 rules remove 95.5% and reach within 0.034 bits of the Phi floor; any 4th Phi-rule gains <=0.0344 bits (a rollback feature-collision, not a 4th mechanism) -> 3 rules are information-complete over Phi up to a named residual; refines C12's asserted I(y;R4|c)=0 with measured 0.0344.
